creator: ginga@amalthea.phys.s.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
The actual port is put here:
	  ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/kappa20-0.2-971003.tar.gz
        
	This port installs new fonts, and changes 
	${PREFIX}/lib/X11/fonts/misc/fonts.{dir,alias} .

	Ports-category is intended to be x11/japanese .

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/kappa20-0.2-971003.tar.gz
